channel.title: Web Development Practice on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Web Development Practice on yexca'Blog

item.title: Building a Website with OneDrive (oneindex)
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-3-flash-preview This article was written on May 9, 2022. It hasn’t been updated and may be difficult to replicate. I recommend checking out newer projects instead. You can use OneDrive to build a cloud drive site (e.g., my old VRChat drive which is now gone), host simple web pages, or even set up an image bed. Introduction to oneindex GitHub: https://github.com/avedu/oneindex Onedrive Directory Index. It doesn’t consume server space or …
